description: Wasm baseline `delegate` instruction used the wrong frame-pushed value when transferring control to a `try_table` landing pad: it set framePushed to Control.stackHeight (correct for legacy `try`) instead of Control.stackHeight + paramSizeOnStack (needed for `try_table` which carries params on the stack). Result: stack pointer misaligned, an incorrect return address can be popped on function return → sec-high stack hijack with attacker control. Requires the exnref/try_table wasm exception feature (nightly + early beta only). Fix landed under sibling bug 1853452: rhunt rewrote delegate to be handled by the unwinder rather than emitted by baseline (git ce5cbe497833, Phabricator D206151), which incidentally fixes 1884518.
